hooks.command: cd /c/Users/radar/SolarPipe && case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *.cs*) dotnet build --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; *.py*) python -m py_compile $(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) 2>&1 | head -5 || true ;; esac
echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -q 'Directory.Packages.props' && echo 'REMINDER: After editing Directory.Packages.props, run dotnet restore' || true

echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python -c "import sys,json; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''); print('WARNING: build_pinn_sequences.py requires SOLARPIPE_SEQUENCES_PATH or defaults to data/sequences/') if 'build_pinn_sequences' in cmd else None" 2>/dev/null || true
